subcodes.first_line: This is the Book which the Wronged One hath revealed on this Day whereon the Herald proclaimeth: "The Kingdom is God's, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم فی هذا الیوم الذی فیه ینادی المناد الملک لله المهیمن القیوم
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to divines; to religious leaders, @prayer for forgiveness, @rejection, opposition and persecution
